channel.title: flove making-of — versioning questions
channel.description: New versioning design questions from flove interviews.

item.title: How should docs handle versioning?
item.description:
• Single 'latest' — One set of docs, always current. Simplest, no version sprawl. • Version per release — Snapshot docs per version. Accurate, but maintenance heavy. • Inline version markers — Tag sections with 'available since FloveX26-3'. Lightweight, informative.
★ decided: — · ◇ recommended: Single 'latest'

item.title: How should flove handle breaking changes?
item.description:
• Deprecation warnings — Warn users/developers, give time to migrate. Gentle, requires tooling. • Automatic migration — Script migrates old apps to new standard. Convenient, risky if wrong. • Manual updates — Each app updates itself. Simple, potentially slow.
★ decided: — · ◇ recommended: Deprecation warnings
